title: Agentic Commerce Data Drift: Why Your AI Agents Aren’t Seeing Reality (And How to Fix It)
description: Data drift is silently crippling AI ecommerce agents. Discover how to build agentic commerce systems that maintain perfect market visibility with enterprise proxies.
h2: The Invisible Crisis Impacting All Agentic Commerce: Data Drift
Why Web Scraping Doesn’t Work at Scale for Agents
How to Build Agentic Commerce Agents Immune to Drift
